short_blurb: Roofing across Valencia, Saugus, Canyon Country, and Newhall.
local_note: The Santa Clarita Valley sees hot summers and periodic wildfire risk. Much of the SCV is in a High or Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zone, requiring Class A assemblies. We install cool-roof underlayment and ember-resistant venting throughout Valencia, Saugus, Canyon Country, and Newhall.
